title: Hannah's Snowies Mini Sweet Jar - 400g
features: Convenient 400g Jar with lid out this item : Re Useable jar : Manufactured and packed in the UK in our Sweet Shop. :We have a huge range of sweets, retro sweets and pick and mix sweet boxes, sweet jars and sweet bags party favours and other sweet gifts for you to enjoy or give as a gift. : Small family Business :Fruity strawberry flavour :This sweet jar can be personalised
description: Product description Have a taste of winter wonderland with Snowies! These creamy white chocolate bites are topped with a crunchy, colourful candy mix that will bring a pop of flavour to your taste buds. (No freezing required!) Ingredients Sugar, vegetable fat (palm), whey powder (from milk), wheat flour (with calcium, iron, niacin, thiamin), wheat starch, glucose syrup, emulsifier: rapeseed lecithin; natural flavourings, glazing agent: beeswax; natural colour: curcumin; colouring foods: beetroot juice concentrate, spirulina extract.
